series_metadata.series_description: These files contain records of banks closed by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Microform: Retain microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility for six (6) years from liquidation, consistent with the statute of limitations for bank record retention in O.R.C. Section 1109.69, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for six (6) years from liquidation, consistent with the statute of limitations for bank record retention in O.R.C. Section 1109.69, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
